title: sabina prostrata
intro: Sabina prostrata, also known as dwarf juniper or savin, is a small evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as warts, eczema, and psoriasis due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of sabina prostrata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and even act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of sabina prostrata can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected skin area or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
